course.title: JavaScript Basics
course.description: Learn the fundamentals of JavaScript, the programming language of the web.

chapter.title: Control Flow and Conditionals
chapter.description: Learn how to make decisions in your code using if/else statements.

lessons.title: If and Else Statements
lessons.explanation: Use `if` to specify a block of code to be executed, if a specified condition is true. Use `else` to specify a block of code to be executed, if the same condition is false.

exercises.statement: Write an `if/else` statement that checks if the variable `score` is greater than 50. If it is, print 'Pass', otherwise print 'Fail'.
exercises.starter_code:
let score = 75;

// Write your if/else statement below

lessons.title: Loops: For and While
lessons.explanation: Loops can execute a block of code a number of times. The `for` loop is often used when you know how many times the script should run.

exercises.statement: Write a `for` loop that prints the numbers from 1 to 3.
exercises.hint: The loop should start with let i = 1 and run as long as i <= 3.
